finding: Business Portfolio (newer type) is incompatible with Facebook Login for Business OAuth flow
evidence: OAuth always redirects to /dialog/oauth/business/cancel/ with selected_business_id= empty

action: Used Access Token Tool at developers.facebook.com/tools/accesstoken to get user token
result: Token has all 11 permissions including pages_manage_posts scoped to page 1103984216121833, but /me/accounts returns empty

action: Assigned Lexmakesit as page asset to Alexander Santiago in Business Portfolio Settings > Accounts > Pages
result: Full control granted but /me/accounts still returns empty with fresh token
human_action: User had to manually navigate Business Suite Settings, add existing page, assign themselves

action: Clicked Get Page Access Token in Graph API Explorer dropdown
result: Opens same broken Facebook Login for Business OAuth popup that cancels
Error #100: requires pages_read_engagement or Page Public Content Access feature

action: Navigated to facebook.com/dialog/oauth with standard params
result: App forces Facebook Login for Business flow regardless — same cancel redirect

action: Asked Meta AI chatbot about the cancel redirect bug
result: Suggested adding standard Facebook Login product to app, but app dashboard only shows use cases not individual products
human_action: User consulted ChatGPT which identified BM asset assignment as the fix path

root_cause: App type Business forces Facebook Login for Business OAuth. Business Portfolio accounts break this OAuth flow. Token from Access Token Tool has permissions listed but app-page relationship never established. /me/accounts returns empty because page not installed with app.
blocker: chicken_and_egg: need page token to install app on page, need app on page for /me/accounts to return page token
resolution_needed: Either change app type to remove Facebook Login for Business dependency, or create new page outside Business Portfolio
